pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh which constructs the file at this specific path.
Verified by reviewing export_result.sh which explicitly checks for this output path.
Verified by reviewing export_result.sh which calculates and requires modulo 5.0 to be near zero.
Verified by reviewing verifier.py which strictly enforces feature_count >= min_count.

Contradicted. The required download URL (github.com/Automating-GIS-processes/CSC18) permanently returns 404, triggering a fallback in setup_task.sh that generates a synthetic 16-bit gradient DEM. Generating 5m contours on a 0-65535 range produces ~13,107 features, far exceeding 2000. Additionally, verifier.py does not check this maximum limit.

privileged_info_summary: The original Helsinki DEM raster is permanently inaccessible due to a 404 error, so the task silently operates on a synthetic 16-bit linear gradient image (0 to 65535) generated by ImageMagick. Running a 5m contour interval on this synthetic dataset produces over 13,000 features, completely contradicting the max_feature_count claim of 2000 (which the verifier also ignores). The output file paths, min_feature_count of 50, and 5m interval requirement remain valid and verified.
